pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target levels to version 17 to match the new JDK runtime.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the compiler plugin is configured for Java 8 while the project is built with JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit JAXB API and Runtime dependencies required because JAXB was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime for javax.xml.bind classes if these dependencies are not provided explicitly on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 and Arquillian test dependencies with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) and Camel Test Spring JUnit 5 to support modern testing frameworks on JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 and older Arquillian containers may have compatibility issues or lack support for JDK 17 features; JUnit 5 is the standard for modern Java projects.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot and Camel dependencies to versions compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Spring Boot (1.3.x) and Camel do not support Java 17 and will fail to start or compile due to internal API changes in the JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove deprecated Fabric8 and Docker Maven plugins that are incompatible with modern JDKs and build environments.
pom.xml.why_exists: Fabric8 and older Docker Maven plugins often rely on deprecated APIs or native libraries that do not function correctly on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven JAXB2 plugin to a version that supports Java 17 and modern JAXB implementations.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-jaxb2-plugin may fail to generate sources or compile on JDK 17 due to missing JAXB modules.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.general_idea: Remove dependency on the deprecated Camel FatJarRouter base class.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.why_exists: The class org.apache.camel.spring.boot.FatJarRouter was removed in Camel 3.x, causing a compile error if the application extends it.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.general_idea: Replace deprecated FatJarRouter.main() call with standard Spring Boot launcher.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.why_exists: The method FatJarRouter.main() does not exist in newer Camel versions, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Remove throws Exception from configure method to comply with Java 17/Camel 3 strictness or modern coding standards.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.why_exists: Method signature mismatch if the base class or interface no longer declares throws Exception, or to adhere to checked exception handling best practices in modern Java.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Replace legacy Activemq queue consumer with a configurable scheduler consumer.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.why_exists: The old endpoint 'activemq:queue:ProcessGtfsQueue' is removed and replaced with a property-based scheduler endpoint '{{avinor.timetable.scheduler.consumer}}'.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Replace legacy Activemq queue producer with Google PubSub producer.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.why_exists: The old endpoint 'activemq:queue:ChouetteImportQueue' is removed and replaced with 'google-pubsub:...'.
